title: Easier Soul Crafting
description: Craft soul lanterns, campfires and torches by just combining regular ones with soul sand or soul soil!
body: Do you have a bunch of torches or lanterns and you wish you could just turn them into soul fire versions? Now you can! Just combine a torch/lantern/campfire with a block of soul soil or soul sand and convert it to a soul fire version, 1 to 1.
